note: streamed full-stack forward path with quantized TensorCUDA lm_head; score_ppl writes a teacher-forced window receipt, but this artifact alone is not generation quality, context, or GRM evidence
prompt:
---

## 1. The problem it solves

Every language model has the same memory problem. What a model "remembers"
during a conversation lives in its **context window** — the working span of
tokens it can attend to at once. That window sits in fast, scarce GPU memory,
and it is finite
